---
title: "AHC"
author: "Yiqian Zhang"
date: "2026-05-06"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Angular Hellinger Compositional Normalization
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# Input:
#   X: matrix or data.frame
#      rows = samples, columns = taxa/features/components
#
# Output:
#   transformed matrix with same dimension as X
#
# Formula:
#   pi_i = X_i / sum_j X_ij
#   c(pi_i) = (1 / sqrt(k)) * sum_j sqrt(pi_ij)
#   s(pi_i) = sqrt(1 - c(pi_i)^2)
#   T(pi_i) = asin(s(pi_i)) / s(pi_i) *
#             (sqrt(pi_i) - c(pi_i) * sqrt(pi_0))
#
# where sqrt(pi_0) = (1/sqrt(k), ..., 1/sqrt(k)).
# ------------------------------------------------------------

angular_hellinger_normalization <- function(X) {
  
  # Convert to matrix
  X <- as.matrix(X)
  
  # Check input
  if (!is.numeric(X)) {
    stop("X must be numeric.")
  }
  
  if (any(X < 0, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    stop("X must contain non-negative values only.")
  }
  
  if (anyNA(X)) {
    stop("X contains NA values. Please handle missing values first.")
  }
  
  # Number of components
  k <- ncol(X)
  
  if (k < 2) {
    stop("X must contain at least two components.")
  }
  
  # Row sums
  rs <- rowSums(X)
  
  if (any(rs <= 0)) {
    stop("Each row must have positive total abundance.")
  }
  
  # Convert count/abundance data to compositional data
  Pi <- sweep(X, 1, rs, FUN = "/")
  
  # Square-root composition
  sqrt_Pi <- sqrt(Pi)
  
  # Uniform direction in square-root space
  sqrt_pi0 <- rep(1 / sqrt(k), k)
  
  # c(pi): cosine-type Hellinger similarity to the uniform composition
  c_pi <- as.vector(sqrt_Pi %*% sqrt_pi0)
  
  # Numerical protection: theoretically c(pi) is in [0, 1]
  c_pi <- pmin(pmax(c_pi, 0), 1)
  
  # s(pi) = sqrt(1 - c(pi)^2)
  s_pi <- sqrt(1 - c_pi^2)
  
  # Scaling factor
  scale_factor <- asin(s_pi) / s_pi
  
  # Handle the exact uniform-composition case where s(pi) = 0
  scale_factor[s_pi == 0] <- 1
  
  # Centered square-root composition
  centered <- sqrt_Pi - outer(c_pi, sqrt_pi0)
  
  # Final transformation
  T <- centered * scale_factor
  
  # Keep row and column names
  rownames(T) <- rownames(X)
  colnames(T) <- colnames(X)
  
  return(T)
}
```



# check simulation result
```{r}
result <- read.csv("replicate_results_AHC_ALR_CLR_ILR_100rep.csv")
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tibble)

alpha_level <- 0.05
setting_vars <- c("alpha", "beta0", "beta", "q")

## ============================================================
## 1. Basic checks
## ============================================================

required_cols <- c(
  "rep_id", "transformation", "power", "fdr",
  "TP", "FP", "FN", "rejections",
  setting_vars
)

missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, colnames(result))

if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(
    "The following required columns are missing from result: ",
    paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")
  )
}

result <- result %>%
  mutate(
    transformation = factor(
      transformation,
      levels = c("AHC", "ALR", "CLR", "ILR")
    )
  )

cat("\nNumber of rows:\n")
print(nrow(result))

cat("\nNumber of replications per setting/method:\n")
print(
  result %>%
    count(alpha, beta0, beta, q, transformation, name = "n_reps") %>%
    arrange(alpha, beta0, beta, q, transformation)
)


## ============================================================
## 2. Summarize power/FDR under each setting and method
## ============================================================

summary_setting_method <- result %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(setting_vars)), transformation) %>%
  summarize(
    n_reps = n(),
    mean_power = mean(power, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_power = sd(power, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_fdr = mean(fdr, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_fdr = sd(fdr, na.rm = TRUE),
    fdr_na_rate = mean(is.na(fdr)),
    mean_TP = mean(TP, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_FP = mean(FP, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_FN = mean(FN, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_rejections = mean(rejections, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    mean_fdr = ifelse(is.nan(mean_fdr), NA_real_, mean_fdr),
    sd_fdr = ifelse(is.nan(sd_fdr), NA_real_, sd_fdr),
    fdr_for_rule = ifelse(is.na(mean_fdr), 0, mean_fdr),
    fdr_controlled = fdr_for_rule <= alpha_level
  )

cat("\nSummary by setting and method:\n")
print(summary_setting_method, n = 50)


## ============================================================
## 3. Find best method under each setting
## ============================================================

## Best by power only
best_by_power <- summary_setting_method %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(setting_vars))) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_power), fdr_for_rule, transformation, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(
    across(all_of(setting_vars)),
    best_power_method = as.character(transformation),
    best_power = mean_power,
    best_power_fdr = mean_fdr
  )

## Best by FDR only
best_by_fdr <- summary_setting_method %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(setting_vars))) %>%
  arrange(fdr_for_rule, desc(mean_power), transformation, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(
    across(all_of(setting_vars)),
    best_fdr_method = as.character(transformation),
    best_fdr = mean_fdr,
    best_fdr_power = mean_power
  )

## Recommended best method:
## First require mean FDR <= 0.05, then choose largest power.
## If several methods control FDR, this chooses the highest-power one.
best_overall <- summary_setting_method %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(setting_vars))) %>%
  arrange(
    desc(fdr_controlled),
    desc(mean_power),
    fdr_for_rule,
    transformation,
    .by_group = TRUE
  ) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(
    across(all_of(setting_vars)),
    best_overall_method = as.character(transformation),
    best_overall_power = mean_power,
    best_overall_fdr = mean_fdr,
    best_overall_fdr_controlled = fdr_controlled
  )

best_by_setting <- best_by_power %>%
  left_join(best_by_fdr, by = setting_vars) %>%
  left_join(best_overall, by = setting_vars) %>%
  arrange(alpha, beta0, beta, q)

cat("\nBest method under each setting:\n")
print(best_by_setting, n = 100)


## If you want to print all settings, use this:
## print(best_by_setting, n = Inf)


## ============================================================
## 4. Winner frequency table
## ============================================================

cat("\nWinner count by best-power criterion:\n")
print(
  best_by_setting %>%
    count(best_power_method, name = "n_settings") %>%
    mutate(prop_settings = n_settings / sum(n_settings)) %>%
    arrange(desc(n_settings))
)

cat("\nWinner count by best-FDR criterion:\n")
print(
  best_by_setting %>%
    count(best_fdr_method, name = "n_settings") %>%
    mutate(prop_settings = n_settings / sum(n_settings)) %>%
    arrange(desc(n_settings))
)

cat("\nWinner count by recommended criterion: FDR control first, then power:\n")
print(
  best_by_setting %>%
    count(best_overall_method, name = "n_settings") %>%
    mutate(prop_settings = n_settings / sum(n_settings)) %>%
    arrange(desc(n_settings))
)


## ============================================================
## 5. Overall method performance across all settings
## ============================================================

overall_method_summary <- summary_setting_method %>%
  group_by(transformation) %>%
  summarize(
    avg_power = mean(mean_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_setting_power = sd(mean_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_fdr = mean(mean_fdr, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_setting_fdr = sd(mean_fdr, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_settings_fdr_controlled = mean(fdr_controlled, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_rejections = mean(mean_rejections, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_power))

cat("\nOverall method summary across all settings:\n")
print(overall_method_summary)


## ============================================================
## 6. Compare AHC against the best competing method
## ============================================================

ahc_vs_others <- summary_setting_method %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(setting_vars))) %>%
  summarize(
    AHC_power = mean_power[transformation == "AHC"],
    AHC_fdr = mean_fdr[transformation == "AHC"],
    best_other_power = max(mean_power[transformation != "AHC"], na.rm = TRUE),
    best_other_method = as.character(
      transformation[transformation != "AHC"][
        which.max(mean_power[transformation != "AHC"])
      ]
    ),
    best_other_fdr = mean_fdr[transformation == best_other_method],
    AHC_minus_best_other_power = AHC_power - best_other_power,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(AHC_minus_best_other_power))

cat("\nSettings where AHC has the largest power advantage over other methods:\n")
print(head(ahc_vs_others, 20))

cat("\nSettings where AHC has the largest power disadvantage relative to other methods:\n")
print(tail(ahc_vs_others, 20))

cat("\nHow often AHC beats all other methods by power:\n")
print(
  ahc_vs_others %>%
    summarize(
      n_settings = n(),
      n_AHC_best_power = sum(AHC_minus_best_other_power > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      prop_AHC_best_power = mean(AHC_minus_best_other_power > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_AHC_power_advantage = mean(AHC_minus_best_other_power, na.rm = TRUE)
    )
)


## ============================================================
## 7. Visualization 1: Average power vs q
## ============================================================

plot_power_q <- summary_setting_method %>%
  group_by(q, transformation) %>%
  summarize(
    avg_power = mean(mean_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = q, y = avg_power, group = transformation, color = transformation)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Power Across Zero-Inflation Level q",
    x = "Zero-inflation probability q",
    y = "Average power",
    color = "Method"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

print(plot_power_q)


## ============================================================
## 8. Visualization 2: Average FDR vs q
## ============================================================

plot_fdr_q <- summary_setting_method %>%
  group_by(q, transformation) %>%
  summarize(
    avg_fdr = mean(mean_fdr, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = q, y = avg_fdr, group = transformation, color = transformation)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = alpha_level, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Average FDR Across Zero-Inflation Level q",
    x = "Zero-inflation probability q",
    y = "Average FDR",
    color = "Method"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

print(plot_fdr_q)


## ============================================================
## 9. Visualization 3: Average power vs beta
## ============================================================

plot_power_beta <- summary_setting_method %>%
  group_by(beta, transformation) %>%
  summarize(
    avg_power = mean(mean_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = beta, y = avg_power, group = transformation, color = transformation)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Power Across Effect Size beta",
    x = "Effect size beta",
    y = "Average power",
    color = "Method"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

print(plot_power_beta)


## ============================================================
## 10. Visualization 4: Power-FDR tradeoff
## ============================================================

plot_power_fdr <- summary_setting_method %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = mean_fdr, y = mean_power, color = transformation)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = alpha_level, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Power-FDR Tradeoff Across All Simulation Settings",
    x = "Mean FDR",
    y = "Mean power",
    color = "Method"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

print(plot_power_fdr)


## ============================================================
## 11. Visualization 5: Recommended winner by beta and q
## ============================================================

winner_beta_q <- best_by_setting %>%
  count(beta, q, best_overall_method, name = "n_wins") %>%
  group_by(beta, q) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_wins), best_overall_method, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup()

plot_winner_beta_q <- winner_beta_q %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(q), y = factor(beta), fill = best_overall_method)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = best_overall_method), size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Most Frequent Recommended Winner by beta and q",
    subtitle = "Recommended criterion: FDR controlled first, then largest power",
    x = "q",
    y = "beta",
    fill = "Winner"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

print(plot_winner_beta_q)


## ============================================================
## 12. Visualization 6: AHC power advantage over best competitor
## ============================================================

plot_ahc_advantage <- ahc_vs_others %>%
  group_by(beta, q) %>%
  summarize(
    avg_AHC_minus_best_other_power =
      mean(AHC_minus_best_other_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = factor(q),
    y = factor(beta),
    fill = avg_AHC_minus_best_other_power
  )) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(avg_AHC_minus_best_other_power, 3)),
    size = 3
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Average AHC Power Advantage Over Best Competing Method",
    x = "q",
    y = "beta",
    fill = "AHC - best other"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

print(plot_ahc_advantage)


## ============================================================
## 13. Optional: simple pattern analysis for when AHC wins
## ============================================================

ahc_win_pattern <- best_by_setting %>%
  mutate(AHC_win = best_overall_method == "AHC") %>%
  group_by(AHC_win) %>%
  summarize(
    n_settings = n(),
    mean_alpha = mean(alpha),
    mean_beta0 = mean(beta0),
    mean_beta = mean(beta),
    mean_q = mean(q),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("\nAverage settings where AHC wins vs does not win:\n")
print(ahc_win_pattern)

cat("\nAHC win rate by q:\n")
print(
  best_by_setting %>%
    mutate(AHC_win = best_overall_method == "AHC") %>%
    group_by(q) %>%
    summarize(
      n_settings = n(),
      AHC_win_rate = mean(AHC_win),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
)

cat("\nAHC win rate by beta:\n")
print(
  best_by_setting %>%
    mutate(AHC_win = best_overall_method == "AHC") %>%
    group_by(beta) %>%
    summarize(
      n_settings = n(),
      AHC_win_rate = mean(AHC_win),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
)
```

# GUniFrac simulation
```{r}
result <- read.csv("replicate_results_AHC_ALR_CLR_ILR_MSeqU_100rep_corrected.csv")
library(tidyverse)

## ============================================================
## 0. Helper printing function
## ============================================================

print_tbl <- function(x, n = Inf) {
  x <- as_tibble(x)
  print(x, n = n, width = Inf)
}


## ============================================================
## 1. Prepare data
## ============================================================

data <- result

required_cols <- c(
  "rep_id", "transformation", "power", "fdr", "TP", "FP", "FN",
  "rejections", "n_tested",
  "diff_otu_direct", "diff_otu_mode",
  "depth_mu", "depth_theta",
  "covariate_eff_sd", "confounder_eff_sd", "depth_conf_factor"
)

missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, colnames(data))

if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop("Missing columns: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
}

data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    transformation = as.character(transformation),
    transformation = factor(transformation, levels = c("AHC", "ALR", "CLR", "ILR")),
    diff_otu_direct = factor(diff_otu_direct),
    diff_otu_mode = factor(diff_otu_mode, levels = c("rare", "mix", "abundant")),
    depth_mu = as.numeric(depth_mu),
    depth_theta = as.numeric(depth_theta),
    covariate_eff_sd = as.numeric(covariate_eff_sd),
    confounder_eff_sd = as.numeric(confounder_eff_sd),
    depth_conf_factor = as.numeric(depth_conf_factor),
    log10_depth_mu = log10(depth_mu),
    fdr = ifelse(is.na(fdr) & rejections == 0, 0, fdr)
  )

setting_vars <- c(
  "diff_otu_direct",
  "diff_otu_mode",
  "depth_mu",
  "depth_theta",
  "covariate_eff_sd",
  "confounder_eff_sd",
  "depth_conf_factor"
)

cat("\n==============================\n")
cat("Basic data check\n")
cat("==============================\n")

cat("\nNumber of rows:\n")
print(nrow(data))

cat("\nMethods:\n")
print(table(data$transformation))

cat("\nNumber of parameter settings:\n")
print(
  data %>%
    distinct(across(all_of(setting_vars))) %>%
    nrow()
)

cat("\nReplications per setting and method:\n")
data %>%
  count(across(all_of(setting_vars)), transformation, name = "n_reps") %>%
  count(n_reps) %>%
  print_tbl()


## ============================================================
## 2. Overall method performance
## ============================================================

cat("\n==============================\n")
cat("Overall method performance\n")
cat("==============================\n")

overall_method <- data %>%
  group_by(transformation) %>%
  summarize(
    n_rows = n(),
    mean_power = mean(power, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_power = sd(power, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_power = median(power, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_power = max(power, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_power_positive = mean(power > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_fdr = mean(fdr, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_fdr = sd(fdr, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_fdr = median(fdr, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_fdr = max(fdr, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_rejections = mean(rejections, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_rejections = max(rejections, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_TP = mean(TP, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_FP = mean(FP, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_FN = mean(FN, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_power))

print_tbl(overall_method)


## ============================================================
## 3. Summarize by setting and method
## ============================================================

summary_by_setting <- data %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(setting_vars)), transformation) %>%
  summarize(
    n_reps = n(),
    mean_power = mean(power, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_power = sd(power, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_power = median(power, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_power = max(power, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_fdr = mean(fdr, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_fdr = sd(fdr, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_fdr = median(fdr, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_fdr = max(fdr, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_TP = mean(TP, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_FP = mean(FP, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_FN = mean(FN, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_rejections = mean(rejections, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_rejections = max(rejections, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_n_tested = mean(n_tested, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_n_na_p = if ("n_na_p" %in% names(data)) mean(n_na_p, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    mean_min_raw_p_signal = if ("min_raw_p_signal" %in% names(data)) mean(min_raw_p_signal, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    mean_min_adj_p_signal = if ("min_adj_p_signal" %in% names(data)) mean(min_adj_p_signal, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    mean_raw_signal_hits = if ("n_raw_p_signal_less_005" %in% names(data)) mean(n_raw_p_signal_less_005, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    mean_adj_signal_hits = if ("n_adj_p_signal_less_005" %in% names(data)) mean(n_adj_p_signal_less_005, na.rm = TRUE) else NA_real_,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("\n==============================\n")
cat("Summary by setting and method: top 50 by power\n")
cat("==============================\n")

summary_by_setting %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_power), desc(mean_rejections)) %>%
  head(50) %>%
  print_tbl(n = 50)


## ============================================================
## 4. Best method under each setting
## ============================================================

cat("\n==============================\n")
cat("Best method under each setting\n")
cat("==============================\n")

best_by_power <- summary_by_setting %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(setting_vars))) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_power), mean_fdr, transformation, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(
    across(all_of(setting_vars)),
    best_power_method = as.character(transformation),
    best_power = mean_power,
    best_power_fdr = mean_fdr,
    best_power_rejections = mean_rejections
  )

best_by_fdr <- summary_by_setting %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(setting_vars))) %>%
  arrange(mean_fdr, desc(mean_power), transformation, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(
    across(all_of(setting_vars)),
    best_fdr_method = as.character(transformation),
    best_fdr = mean_fdr,
    best_fdr_power = mean_power
  )

best_overall <- summary_by_setting %>%
  mutate(fdr_controlled = mean_fdr <= 0.05) %>%
  group_by(across(all_of(setting_vars))) %>%
  arrange(desc(fdr_controlled), desc(mean_power), mean_fdr, transformation, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  transmute(
    across(all_of(setting_vars)),
    best_overall_method = as.character(transformation),
    best_overall_power = mean_power,
    best_overall_fdr = mean_fdr,
    best_overall_fdr_controlled = fdr_controlled
  )

best_setting_table <- best_by_power %>%
  left_join(best_by_fdr, by = setting_vars) %>%
  left_join(best_overall, by = setting_vars)

cat("\nBest method table: first 50 settings\n")
best_setting_table %>%
  head(50) %>%
  print_tbl(n = 50)

cat("\nWinner count by highest power:\n")
best_setting_table %>%
  count(best_power_method, name = "n_settings") %>%
  mutate(prop_settings = n_settings / sum(n_settings)) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_settings)) %>%
  print_tbl()

cat("\nWinner count by lowest FDR:\n")
best_setting_table %>%
  count(best_fdr_method, name = "n_settings") %>%
  mutate(prop_settings = n_settings / sum(n_settings)) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_settings)) %>%
  print_tbl()

cat("\nWinner count by FDR-control-first then power:\n")
best_setting_table %>%
  count(best_overall_method, name = "n_settings") %>%
  mutate(prop_settings = n_settings / sum(n_settings)) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_settings)) %>%
  print_tbl()


## ============================================================
## 5. Direct comparison: AHC vs ALR, CLR, ILR
## ============================================================

cat("\n==============================\n")
cat("AHC vs other methods\n")
cat("==============================\n")

wide_setting <- summary_by_setting %>%
  select(
    all_of(setting_vars),
    transformation,
    mean_power,
    mean_fdr,
    mean_rejections,
    mean_TP,
    mean_FP
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = transformation,
    values_from = c(mean_power, mean_fdr, mean_rejections, mean_TP, mean_FP)
  )

ahc_compare <- wide_setting %>%
  mutate(
    AHC_minus_ALR_power = mean_power_AHC - mean_power_ALR,
    AHC_minus_CLR_power = mean_power_AHC - mean_power_CLR,
    AHC_minus_ILR_power = mean_power_AHC - mean_power_ILR,
    AHC_minus_ALR_fdr = mean_fdr_AHC - mean_fdr_ALR,
    AHC_minus_CLR_fdr = mean_fdr_AHC - mean_fdr_CLR,
    AHC_minus_ILR_fdr = mean_fdr_AHC - mean_fdr_ILR,
    AHC_best_power = mean_power_AHC >= pmax(mean_power_ALR, mean_power_CLR, mean_power_ILR, na.rm = TRUE),
    AHC_best_fdr = mean_fdr_AHC <= pmin(mean_fdr_ALR, mean_fdr_CLR, mean_fdr_ILR, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

cat("\nAHC pairwise power advantage summary:\n")
ahc_compare %>%
  summarize(
    mean_AHC_minus_ALR_power = mean(AHC_minus_ALR_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_AHC_minus_CLR_power = mean(AHC_minus_CLR_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_AHC_minus_ILR_power = mean(AHC_minus_ILR_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_AHC_beats_ALR_power = mean(AHC_minus_ALR_power > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_AHC_beats_CLR_power = mean(AHC_minus_CLR_power > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_AHC_beats_ILR_power = mean(AHC_minus_ILR_power > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_AHC_best_power = mean(AHC_best_power, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  print_tbl()

cat("\nSettings where AHC has largest power advantage over CLR:\n")
ahc_compare %>%
  arrange(desc(AHC_minus_CLR_power)) %>%
  select(
    all_of(setting_vars),
    mean_power_AHC,
    mean_power_CLR,
    AHC_minus_CLR_power,
    mean_fdr_AHC,
    mean_fdr_CLR
  ) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  print_tbl(n = 20)

cat("\nSettings where AHC is worse than CLR by power:\n")
ahc_compare %>%
  arrange(AHC_minus_CLR_power) %>%
  select(
    all_of(setting_vars),
    mean_power_AHC,
    mean_power_CLR,
    AHC_minus_CLR_power,
    mean_fdr_AHC,
    mean_fdr_CLR
  ) %>%
  head(20) %>%
  print_tbl(n = 20)


## ============================================================
## 6. Model-based pattern analysis: power
## ============================================================

cat("\n==============================\n")
cat("Linear models for mean power by method\n")
cat("==============================\n")

model_data <- summary_by_setting %>%
  mutate(
    depth_mu_f = factor(depth_mu, levels = sort(unique(depth_mu), decreasing = TRUE)),
    depth_theta_f = factor(depth_theta),
    covariate_eff_sd_f = factor(covariate_eff_sd),
    confounder_eff_sd_f = factor(confounder_eff_sd),
    depth_conf_factor_f = factor(depth_conf_factor)
  )

power_models <- list()
power_coef_list <- list()

for (trans in levels(model_data$transformation)) {
  
  subset_data <- model_data %>%
    filter(transformation == trans)
  
  model <- lm(
    mean_power ~ diff_otu_direct + diff_otu_mode +
      depth_mu_f + depth_theta_f +
      covariate_eff_sd_f + confounder_eff_sd_f + depth_conf_factor_f,
    data = subset_data
  )
  
  power_models[[trans]] <- model
  
  cat("\n------------------------------\n")
  cat("Power model for:", trans, "\n")
  cat("------------------------------\n")
  print(summary(model))
  
  coefs <- as_tibble(summary(model)$coefficients, rownames = "variable") %>%
    mutate(transformation = trans) %>%
    relocate(transformation, variable)
  
  power_coef_list[[trans]] <- coefs
}

power_coefficients <- bind_rows(power_coef_list)

cat("\nPower model coefficients, long format:\n")
print_tbl(power_coefficients)

cat("\nPower model coefficients, wide format using estimates only:\n")
power_coefficients_wide <- power_coefficients %>%
  select(transformation, variable, Estimate) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = variable, values_from = Estimate)

print_tbl(power_coefficients_wide)


## ============================================================
## 7. Model-based pattern analysis: FDR
## ============================================================

cat("\n==============================\n")
cat("Linear models for mean FDR by method\n")
cat("==============================\n")

fdr_models <- list()
fdr_coef_list <- list()

for (trans in levels(model_data$transformation)) {
  
  subset_data <- model_data %>%
    filter(transformation == trans)
  
  model <- lm(
    mean_fdr ~ diff_otu_direct + diff_otu_mode +
      depth_mu_f + depth_theta_f +
      covariate_eff_sd_f + confounder_eff_sd_f + depth_conf_factor_f,
    data = subset_data
  )
  
  fdr_models[[trans]] <- model
  
  cat("\n------------------------------\n")
  cat("FDR model for:", trans, "\n")
  cat("------------------------------\n")
  print(summary(model))
  
  coefs <- as_tibble(summary(model)$coefficients, rownames = "variable") %>%
    mutate(transformation = trans) %>%
    relocate(transformation, variable)
  
  fdr_coef_list[[trans]] <- coefs
}

fdr_coefficients <- bind_rows(fdr_coef_list)

cat("\nFDR model coefficients, long format:\n")
print_tbl(fdr_coefficients)

cat("\nFDR model coefficients, wide format using estimates only:\n")
fdr_coefficients_wide <- fdr_coefficients %>%
  select(transformation, variable, Estimate) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = variable, values_from = Estimate)

print_tbl(fdr_coefficients_wide)


## ============================================================
## 8. Combined interaction models
## ============================================================

cat("\n==============================\n")
cat("Combined interaction model for mean power\n")
cat("==============================\n")

combined_power_model <- lm(
  mean_power ~ transformation * (
    diff_otu_direct + diff_otu_mode +
      depth_mu_f + depth_theta_f +
      covariate_eff_sd_f + confounder_eff_sd_f + depth_conf_factor_f
  ),
  data = model_data
)

print(summary(combined_power_model))

cat("\nANOVA table for combined power model:\n")
print(anova(combined_power_model))


cat("\n==============================\n")
cat("Combined interaction model for mean FDR\n")
cat("==============================\n")

combined_fdr_model <- lm(
  mean_fdr ~ transformation * (
    diff_otu_direct + diff_otu_mode +
      depth_mu_f + depth_theta_f +
      covariate_eff_sd_f + confounder_eff_sd_f + depth_conf_factor_f
  ),
  data = model_data
)

print(summary(combined_fdr_model))

cat("\nANOVA table for combined FDR model:\n")
print(anova(combined_fdr_model))


## ============================================================
## 9. Diagnostics for p-values and Bonferroni filtering
## ============================================================

cat("\n==============================\n")
cat("Diagnostics for p-values and Bonferroni filtering\n")
cat("==============================\n")

diagnostic_cols <- c(
  "mean_min_raw_p_signal",
  "mean_min_adj_p_signal",
  "mean_raw_signal_hits",
  "mean_adj_signal_hits"
)

if (all(diagnostic_cols %in% names(summary_by_setting))) {
  
  diagnostic_table <- summary_by_setting %>%
    group_by(transformation) %>%
    summarize(
      avg_min_raw_p_signal = mean(mean_min_raw_p_signal, na.rm = TRUE),
      avg_min_adj_p_signal = mean(mean_min_adj_p_signal, na.rm = TRUE),
      avg_raw_signal_hits = mean(mean_raw_signal_hits, na.rm = TRUE),
      avg_adj_signal_hits = mean(mean_adj_signal_hits, na.rm = TRUE),
      avg_rejections = mean(mean_rejections, na.rm = TRUE),
      avg_power = mean(mean_power, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(avg_power))
  
  print_tbl(diagnostic_table)
  
  cat("\nSettings with raw signal hits but no adjusted signal hits:\n")
  
  summary_by_setting %>%
    filter(mean_raw_signal_hits > 0, mean_adj_signal_hits == 0) %>%
    arrange(desc(mean_raw_signal_hits)) %>%
    select(
      all_of(setting_vars),
      transformation,
      mean_power,
      mean_fdr,
      mean_raw_signal_hits,
      mean_adj_signal_hits,
      mean_min_raw_p_signal,
      mean_min_adj_p_signal
    ) %>%
    head(50) %>%
    print_tbl(n = 50)
}


## ============================================================
## 10. Plots
## ============================================================

cat("\n==============================\n")
cat("Plots\n")
cat("==============================\n")

p1 <- summary_by_setting %>%
  group_by(diff_otu_mode, transformation) %>%
  summarize(
    avg_power = mean(mean_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_fdr = mean(mean_fdr, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = diff_otu_mode, y = avg_power, fill = transformation)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Average Power by Differential OTU Mode",
    x = "Differential OTU mode",
    y = "Average power",
    fill = "Method"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

print(p1)


p2 <- summary_by_setting %>%
  group_by(depth_mu, transformation) %>%
  summarize(
    avg_power = mean(mean_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_fdr = mean(mean_fdr, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(depth_mu), y = avg_power, group = transformation, color = transformation)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Power by Sequencing Depth",
    x = "depth_mu",
    y = "Average power",
    color = "Method"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

print(p2)


p3 <- summary_by_setting %>%
  group_by(diff_otu_direct, transformation) %>%
  summarize(
    avg_power = mean(mean_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_fdr = mean(mean_fdr, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = diff_otu_direct, y = avg_power, fill = transformation)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Average Power by Signal Direction",
    x = "Differential OTU direction",
    y = "Average power",
    fill = "Method"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

print(p3)


p4 <- summary_by_setting %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = mean_fdr, y = mean_power, color = transformation)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(
    title = "Power-FDR Tradeoff Across Settings",
    x = "Mean FDR",
    y = "Mean power",
    color = "Method"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

print(p4)


p5 <- best_setting_table %>%
  count(diff_otu_mode, depth_mu, best_power_method, name = "n_win") %>%
  group_by(diff_otu_mode, depth_mu) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_win), best_power_method, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(depth_mu), y = diff_otu_mode, fill = best_power_method)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = best_power_method), size = 3) +
  labs(
    title = "Most Frequent Best-Power Method by Mode and Sequencing Depth",
    x = "depth_mu",
    y = "Differential OTU mode",
    fill = "Winner"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

print(p5)


p6 <- ahc_compare %>%
  group_by(diff_otu_mode, depth_mu) %>%
  summarize(
    avg_AHC_minus_CLR_power = mean(AHC_minus_CLR_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_AHC_minus_ALR_power = mean(AHC_minus_ALR_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_AHC_minus_ILR_power = mean(AHC_minus_ILR_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("avg_AHC_minus"),
    names_to = "comparison",
    values_to = "power_difference"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    comparison = recode(
      comparison,
      avg_AHC_minus_CLR_power = "AHC - CLR",
      avg_AHC_minus_ALR_power = "AHC - ALR",
      avg_AHC_minus_ILR_power = "AHC - ILR"
    )
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(depth_mu), y = diff_otu_mode, fill = power_difference)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(power_difference, 3)), size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ comparison) +
  labs(
    title = "AHC Power Advantage by Mode and Depth",
    x = "depth_mu",
    y = "Differential OTU mode",
    fill = "Power difference"
  ) +
  theme_bw()

print(p6)


## ============================================================
## 11. Compact final printed summary
## ============================================================

cat("\n==============================\n")
cat("Compact final summary\n")
cat("==============================\n")

cat("\nOverall ranking by mean power:\n")
overall_method %>%
  select(transformation, mean_power, mean_fdr, mean_rejections, prop_power_positive) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_power)) %>%
  print_tbl()

cat("\nOverall ranking by mean FDR:\n")
overall_method %>%
  select(transformation, mean_power, mean_fdr, mean_rejections, prop_power_positive) %>%
  arrange(mean_fdr) %>%
  print_tbl()

cat("\nAHC comparison summary:\n")
ahc_compare %>%
  summarize(
    mean_AHC_power = mean(mean_power_AHC, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_ALR_power = mean(mean_power_ALR, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_CLR_power = mean(mean_power_CLR, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_ILR_power = mean(mean_power_ILR, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_AHC_best_power = mean(AHC_best_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    prop_AHC_best_fdr = mean(AHC_best_fdr, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_AHC_minus_ALR_power = mean(AHC_minus_ALR_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_AHC_minus_CLR_power = mean(AHC_minus_CLR_power, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_AHC_minus_ILR_power = mean(AHC_minus_ILR_power, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  print_tbl()
```
